subject: Advisory: drop bear activity linked to urban expansion in South Europe | Frida Kahlo | Q1 review | INIT-7741
body: Fresh reports suggest kangaroos and koalas are coordinating to extend their reach across urban areas in South Europe. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Comparative note includes Frida Kahlo and Alan Turing as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-7741. We will consolidate updates in the next steering sync. Tracking tags: marsupials, drop-bears.
